══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Earth Genasi — Winged Striker --- HP: 29/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:8+4=12 vs DC 16] FAIL!
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:19+4=23 vs DC 16] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Earth Genasi — Winged Striker --- HP: 29/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Young Red Dragon (disadvantage protects concentration).
Unknown action type: cast_healing_word
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:7+4=11 vs DC 16] FAIL! 6 psychic damage. HP: 172/178
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 172/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Earth Genasi — Winged Striker (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Earth Genasi — Winged Striker
→ Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 14] HIT! 25 damage. Earth Genasi — Winged Striker HP: 4/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hold Person ends!
→ Bite: [d20:4+10=14 vs AC 14] HIT! 13 damage. Earth Genasi — Winged Striker HP: -9/67
